testcase.name: @AfterMethod tearDown
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.WebDriverException: Timed out waiting for driver server to stop. testcase.name: login
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Expected condition failed: waiting for visibility of element found by By.xpath: //div[@class='card-body'], but... org.openqa.selenium.NoSuchElementException: no such element: Unable to locate element: {"method":"xpath","selector":"//div[@class='card-body']"}. (tried for 3 seconds with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.40.0', revision: 'b3333f1' System info: os.name: 'Mac OS X', os.arch: 'x86_64', os.version: '12.2', java.version: '19.0.1' Driver info: net.bytebuddy.renamed.java.lang.Object$ByteBuddy$ahrJukWS Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 145.0.7632.160, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 145.0.7632.117 (de4e5d6e13b..., userDataDir: /var/folders/rp/n1c8ps1s7hv...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:51142}, goog:processID: 78816, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: mac, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:51142/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 145.0.7632.160, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 4a7d12764139aa7f65d0b2409a4d40ca at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.WebDriverWait.timeoutException(WebDriverWait.java:84) at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.FluentWait.until(FluentWait.java:231) at com.simran.automation.EcommerceProject.LandingPageTest.login(LandingPageTest.java:37) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.Executors$RunnableAdapter.call(Executors.java:577) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.FutureTask.run(FutureTask.java:317) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor.runWorker(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:1144) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor$Worker.run(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:642) at java.base/java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:1589) ... testcase.name: verifySubmitOrderTest
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Expected condition failed: waiting for visibility of element found by By.xpath: //div[@class='card-body'], but... org.openqa.selenium.NoSuchElementException: no such element: Unable to locate element: {"method":"xpath","selector":"//div[@class='card-body']"}.
